en: If there's one thing I'm not, I'm not a criminal. Let me tell you something. If you're skipping over body day,
ko: 내가 아닌 게 하나 있다면, 난 범죄자가 아니야.

en: you're going straight to jail. We don't do that here.
ko: 바로 감옥행이야. 여기선 그런 거 안 해.

en: Ah, that feels nice. Three, feeling heavy today.
It's getting roasty and toasty. I would say one of my personality traits is that I have weak biceps,
so I'm a bit nervous for this one.
ko: 내 성격 특성 중 하나가 이두근이 약하다는 거야, 그래서 이건 좀 긴장돼.

en: Ha, ha, ha, ha. You thought it was one.
It's one and a half. It's a full rep. Back down to half.
ko: 1.5개야. 풀 레프 하나 하고, 다시 절반으로 내려.

en: Back up all the way down. That's a one and a half-er.
ko: 다시 올라가서 끝까지 내려. 이게 1.5 레프야.

en: Are you using this? Yeah, I'm actually in the middle.
ko: 이거 쓰고 있어요? 네, 사실 하는 중이에요.

en: Time to attack our back. Seven.
Hey. Bad news. It's a super set.
We're going to rowing. Get in the middle of the bar, straight to your hip.
Stretch at the top, squeeze at the bottom. Got forward length, and we're not getting the cable wedgie.
The labia is being attacked. Biceps get destroyed. You don't really like this?
